'''âth-r-th''' ('''katharath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:naa|naa]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:naa|naa]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-r-th
|-
! Lemma
| katharath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitharath|thitharath]] || [[word:jitharath|jitharath]] || [[word:shitharath|shitharath]] || [[word:kitharath|kitharath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutharath|thuthutharath]] || [[word:jujutharath|jujutharath]] || [[word:shushutharath|shushutharath]] || [[word:kukutharath|kukutharath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutharath|thutharath]] || [[word:jutharath|jutharath]] || [[word:shutharath|shutharath]] || [[word:kutharath|kutharath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutharath|thutharath]] || [[word:jutharath|jutharath]] || [[word:shutharath|shutharath]] || [[word:kutharath|kutharath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetharath|thetharath]] || [[word:jetharath|jetharath]] || [[word:shetharath|shetharath]] || [[word:ketharath|ketharath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotharath|thothotharath]] || [[word:jojotharath|jojotharath]] || [[word:shoshotharath|shoshotharath]] || [[word:kokotharath|kokotharath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotharath|thotharath]] || [[word:jotharath|jotharath]] || [[word:shotharath|shotharath]] || [[word:kotharath|kotharath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotharath|thotharath]] || [[word:jotharath|jotharath]] || [[word:shotharath|shotharath]] || [[word:kotharath|kotharath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtharath|thĂŠtharath]] || [[word:jĂŠtharath|jĂŠtharath]] || [[word:shĂŠtharath|shĂŠtharath]] || [[word:kĂŠtharath|kĂŠtharath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatharath|thathatharath]] || [[word:jajatharath|jajatharath]] || [[word:shashatharath|shashatharath]] || [[word:kakatharath|kakatharath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatharath|thatharath]] || [[word:jatharath|jatharath]] || [[word:shatharath|shatharath]] || [[word:katharath|katharath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatharath|thatharath]] || [[word:jatharath|jatharath]] || [[word:shatharath|shatharath]] || [[word:katharath|katharath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatharath|shatharath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatharath|goshatharath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatharath|gokishatharath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatharathnĂŒ|shatharathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatharathnknĂŒ|goshatharathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharathnĂŒ|gokishatharathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatharathshĂ«|shatharathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatharathnkshĂ«|goshatharathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatharathshĂ«|gokishatharathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharathro|shatharathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharathnkro|goshatharathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharathro|gokishatharathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharathmu|shatharathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharathnkmu|goshatharathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharathmu|gokishatharathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatharathsher|shatharathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatharathnksher|goshatharathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatharathsher|gokishatharathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatharathng|shatharathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatharathnkng|goshatharathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatharathng|gokishatharathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatharathya|shatharathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatharathnkya|goshatharathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatharathya|gokishatharathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatharathyam|shatharathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatharathnkyam|goshatharathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatharathyam|gokishatharathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharathnĂŒshĂ«|shatharathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatharathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatharathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharathnĂŒro|shatharathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharathnknĂŒro|goshatharathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharathnĂŒro|gokishatharathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharathnĂŒmu|shatharathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharathnknĂŒmu|goshatharathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharathnĂŒmu|gokishatharathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharathshĂ«nĂŒ|shatharathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatharathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatharathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharathshĂ«ro|shatharathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharathnkshĂ«ro|goshatharathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharathshĂ«ro|gokishatharathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharathshĂ«mu|shatharathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharathnkshĂ«mu|goshatharathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharathshĂ«mu|gokishatharathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharathronĂŒ|shatharathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharathnkronĂŒ|goshatharathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharathronĂŒ|gokishatharathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharathroshĂ«|shatharathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharathnkroshĂ«|goshatharathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharathroshĂ«|gokishatharathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatharathromu|shatharathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatharathnkromu|goshatharathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatharathromu|gokishatharathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatharathmunĂŒ|shatharathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatharathnkmunĂŒ|goshatharathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatharathmunĂŒ|gokishatharathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatharathmushĂ«|shatharathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatharathnkmushĂ«|goshatharathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatharathmushĂ«|gokishatharathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatharathmuro|shatharathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatharathnkmuro|goshatharathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatharathmuro|gokishatharathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
